name: Minsk (Belarus)
description: A red field charged with the coat of arms of Minsk: a depiction of the Virgin Mary in a blue oval shield, flanked by angels.
history: The current flag of Minsk was adopted on 27 July 2001. It uses the city's coat of arms, which dates back to the city's Magdeburg-rights charter of 1591. The arms depict the Ascension of the Virgin Mary, supported by two angels.
